'''''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1''' is a collection containing the first three issues of [[Marvel Comics]]' adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].

==Publisher's summary==
''The best ''Star Wars'' comics creative team to ever put pen to paper, Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson, unite once again to adapt the second Star Wars movie to comic form. This first of two volumes brings the Marvel Comics adaptation of ''The Empire Strikes Back'' back into print for the first time since 1980. Al Williamson's classic art is supplemented by brand-new interior coloring, as well as a new cover by Williamson commissioned especially for this volume.''

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' (1977) 40]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' (1977) 41]]
